name: Sweet Mollies
recipeIngredient: 6 1/2 ounces regular potato chips, finely crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat together butter, granulated sugar, brown sugar, and vanilla until well blended.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Gradually add the flour mixture to the butter mixture, stirring until just combined.
4. Stir in butterscotch chips and potato chips.
5. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased baking sheet.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F for 9-11 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Let stand on the baking sheet for 2 minutes before removing to a wire rack to cool completely.
Makes about 5 dozen cookies.
